Work

Projects

A collection of coursework and personal projects, mostly in Python, Java, Haskell, and the web.

Python

Sorting Network Generator 1st semester exam

Generating optimal sorting networks for lists.
C3Paw — Cat & Dog Classifier 4th semester exam

CNN-based image classification of cats and dogs using PyTorch.
Path & CNN Optimization 4th semester exam

Shortest-path algorithms and convolutional neural network optimisation.
Mood2-D2 — Emotion Classifier 4th semester exam

Classifying human emotions from facial expressions.
Simplex Environment Search 4th semester exam

Simplex method environment search and roar-net-api solver.
SundAdmin API Personal project

Personal REST API project — first foray into backend development.

Java

Pacman 2nd semester exam

Pacman-like game built with JavaFX. Custom game engine with entity logic, collision detection, and AI ghosts.

Haskell

snakey 3rd semester exam

A domain-specific language for defining and running 1v1 snake-like games.

Web

Typstnique Personal project

An interactive game for learning Typst syntax. Built for fun and to help fellow students.
Practice Quiz App Personal project

A self-hosted quiz app for SDU exam practice — multiple-choice and free-response, with MathJax.

Coursework

SDU Notes 2nd–5th semester

Typst-formatted lecture notes covering semesters 2–5: algorithms, ML, linear algebra, KR, and more.
